natures.label: Robbery in progress
natures.definition: Force or threat of force to take property while the crime is still active or the suspect is still on scene or in immediate flight with the victim under threat.

natures.label: Assault in progress
natures.definition: Active physical attack or credible immediate assault threat. Weapons upgrade to WEAPONS nature or retain ASSAULT-IP with weapons flag.

natures.label: Weapons / armed subject
natures.definition: Person with a weapon or credible armed-subject report. May be IP or just-occurred; house default is high acuity until cold and secure.

natures.label: Domestic disturbance
natures.definition: Domestic violence or domestic disturbance involving intimate partners/household. Backup required by house policy even when weapons not confirmed.

natures.label: Disturbance / loud party
natures.definition: Noise, crowd, or non-domestic argument without confirmed weapons or active assault. Common undercode trap when CT later adds weapons/IP cues.

natures.label: Theft report
natures.definition: Cold property theft report after the fact. Suspect not present. Not robbery.

natures.label: Welfare check
natures.definition: Check the welfare of a person. Priority elevates with crisis, medical distress, or access barriers; language line may delay entry of accurate notes.

natures.label: 911 open line / hang-up
natures.definition: Open line, hang-up, or incomplete 911 with insufficient voice content. Treat as urgent until proven accidental. Location often partial or unverified.

natures.label: Burglary in progress
natures.definition: Active break-in or burglary still occurring. Backup required. Weapons flag if tools/threat escalate.

natures.label: Shots heard
natures.definition: Report of gunfire heard. Default urgent/high; upgrade when person down, active shooter cues, or multiple rounds with victims. Weapons safety always on radio.

natures.label: Traffic crash
natures.definition: Vehicle collision. Default routine/prompt depending on injury; traffic unit preferred when available. Injury/IP upgrades priority.

natures.label: Suspicious person
natures.definition: Suspicious person or loitering without confirmed crime. Soft type preference patrol; upgrade on weapons or crime-in-progress cues.

natures.label: Officer emergency
natures.definition: Officer needs help / unit emergency. P0 full preempt, multi-unit response, emergency traffic mode.

natures.label: Alarm
natures.definition: Intrusion or panic alarm without confirmed IP. Default prompt; upgrade on verified entry, panic with voice, or matching crime cues.
